data.title: Morgan Stanley launches stablecoin reserve fund compliant with the GENIUS Act.
data.description: Morgan Stanley Investment Management has launched a government money market fund called Stablecoin Reserves Portfolio (MSNXX) to provide stablecoin issuers with a reserve asset holding scheme that complies with the GENIUS Act. This fund is part of the Morgan Stanley Institutional Liquidity Fund Trust and primarily targets payment-type stablecoin issuers that require accredited investment instruments to support their token reserves. The fund maintains a stable net asset value of $1 by investing in cash, U.S. Treasury bills, notes, and bonds with remaining maturities of 93 days or less, and overnight repurchase agreements backed by U.S. Treasury securities. Amy Oldenburg, Head of Digital Asset Strategy at Morgan Stanley, stated that this move aims to modernize financial infrastructure and expand digital investment solutions for institutional clients. As of March 31, 2026, Morgan Stanley Investment Management and its affiliates have $1.9 trillion in assets under management.

data.title: Bitcoin Shows Clear Bullish Signal as Vector Framework Activates
data.description: Glassnode has announced that the Vector framework has triggered a clear bullish signal for Bitcoin. According to Foresight News, this development indicates potential positive momentum for the cryptocurrency. The Vector framework is a tool used to analyze market trends and signals, and its activation suggests a favorable outlook for Bitcoin's performance in the near future.

data.title: AI Industry in Early Stages of Rapid Evolution, Says NeoSoul Co-Founder
data.description:
The AI industry is still in the early stages of rapid evolution, according to NeoSoul co-founder Kaelan. Speaking at the Hong Kong Intelligent Crypto Finance Forum, Kaelan emphasized the importance of evaluating AI projects not only based on current products but also on the team's ability to adapt to changes in foundational model capabilities.

Kaelan highlighted that AI entrepreneurship requires both practical and visionary approaches. A practical approach involves having the engineering, product design, and market understanding to create tangible products. Meanwhile, a visionary approach involves building in alignment with the evolution of large models.

He noted that some early AI products may appear as toys, but in emerging industries, such experimental forms should be allowed. Many genuine new paradigms often first appear as experimental products.

data.title: Eni Group: Middle East Crisis Impact Exceeds Market Expectations
data.description: Italian oil company Eni Group has stated that the ongoing crisis in the Middle East is expected to have a more significant impact than the market currently anticipates. According to Jin10, the company emphasized the potential for disruptions in oil supply and heightened geopolitical tensions, which could lead to increased volatility in global energy markets. Eni Group's assessment highlights the need for careful monitoring of developments in the region, as the situation may affect oil prices and energy security worldwide.

data.title: Russia's Economy Shows Signs of Recovery, Central Bank Governor Says
data.description: Russia's Central Bank Governor Elvira Nabiullina stated that the country's economy began to recover in March and April. According to Jin10, this recovery comes after a period where the economic performance did not meet expectations.

data.title: US Defense Secretary emphasizes that Iran will not possess nuclear weapons
data.description: At the start of a press conference, U.S. Defense Secretary Hergsays emphasized one of the Trump administration's primary war objectives: "Ultimately, Iran will not possess nuclear weapons." Trump has not yet decided whether to achieve this through diplomatic means or a military strike. Hergsays stated that since the White House ordered the blockade of Iranian ports, 34 merchant ships have been intercepted and diverted by U.S. Navy warships. (The New York Times)

data.title: South Africa Proposes New Crypto Regulations with Potential Penalties
data.description:
South Africa's National Treasury has released draft regulations aimed at incorporating cryptocurrency into existing exchange controls. According to NS3.AI, these proposed rules could impose penalties of up to R1 million or five years in prison for non-compliance. The draft legislation would empower officers to demand passwords, PINs, or private keys necessary to access crypto assets, with refusal constituting a criminal offense.

Residents holding Bitcoin (BTC) or other cryptocurrencies above a threshold set by the Minister of Finance would be required to declare their holdings within 30 days. Additionally, larger trades would be restricted to authorized providers. However, the Treasury has yet to disclose the specific threshold amounts.

The comment period for these draft regulations presents conflicting deadlines, with dates set for 10 June 2026 and 18 May 2026. This discrepancy has raised concerns among stakeholders about the clarity and implementation timeline of the proposed rules.

data.title: U.S. Defense Secretary Announces Deployment of Second Aircraft Carrier
data.description: U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has announced the deployment of a second American aircraft carrier to join the blockade against Iran. According to Odaily, this move is part of ongoing efforts to strengthen military presence in the region.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Meta Platforms Signs Multi-Billion Dollar Deal with Amazon for AI Chips
data.description: Meta Platforms has entered into a multi-billion dollar agreement with Amazon to utilize Amazon's CPU chips for artificial intelligence applications. According to Jin10, this collaboration marks a significant step in Meta's efforts to enhance its AI capabilities. The deal underscores the growing importance of advanced chip technology in the development and deployment of AI solutions.

data.title: Iranian Delegation to Visit Islamabad Amid Uncertain Ceasefire Talks
data.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Aragchi is set to lead a delegation to Islamabad either late Friday or Saturday. According to Odaily, the visit follows uncertainty surrounding a potential second round of ceasefire talks between Iran and the United States. Sources indicate the delegation is expected to arrive at around 10 p.m. local time (1 a.m. UTC+8), though it remains unclear if negotiations will commence soon. On Friday, Pakistani and Iranian officials held a phone conference to discuss the stalled ceasefire efforts.

data.title: Ethereum Experiences $1.1 Billion Net Exchange Outflows Amid Smart Contract Concerns
data.description: Ethereum has witnessed net exchange outflows totaling $1.1 billion this week, according to Sentora. Investors are reportedly transferring Ethereum into self-custody due to concerns surrounding smart contracts, which is impacting market liquidity. According to NS3.AI, this trend reflects a growing caution among investors as they seek to mitigate risks associated with smart contract vulnerabilities. The movement of Ethereum into self-custody is contributing to reduced liquidity in the market, highlighting the ongoing challenges faced by the cryptocurrency sector.

data.title: US Defense Secretary: A second US aircraft carrier will join the blockade of Iran.
data.description: US Defense Secretary Hergsays: A second US aircraft carrier will join the blockade operation (against Iran). (Jinshi)

data.title: An Iranian delegation travels to Pakistan; the prospects for the talks remain unclear.
data.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Araqchi is scheduled to lead an Iranian delegation to Islamabad late Friday or Saturday, amid uncertainty surrounding a potential second round of ceasefire talks between Iran and the United States. Sources say the delegation is expected to arrive around 10 p.m. local time (1 a.m. Beijing time), but it is unclear whether talks are about to begin. Pakistani and Iranian officials held a telephone conference on Friday to discuss the stalled ceasefire efforts. (New York Post)

data.title: Binance launches Agentic Wallet designed specifically for AI agents.
data.description: Binance Wallet has launched Agentic Wallet, a keyless wallet designed specifically for AI agents. Users can authorize AI agents to conduct asset transactions, transfers, and management within set parameters. The wallet has an independent balance and supports major networks such as BNB Smart Chain, Solana, Ethereum, and Base. Furthermore, Binance announced that from April 24th to May 9th, 2026, transactions and transfers made through Agentic Wallet will enjoy limited gas fee subsidies and zero service fees.

data.title: Revolut to Cease Precious Metals Trading in EEA by June 2026
data.description: Revolut has announced its decision to terminate precious metals trading services in over 30 European Economic Area (EEA) markets by June 15, 2026. According to NS3.AI, customers will have the option to manually sell their holdings until the specified date. After June 15, any remaining positions will be liquidated at market rates, with commission fees being refunded. Despite this change, Revolut's cryptocurrency services will continue to operate. This follows the company's acquisition of a MiCA license in Cyprus and the introduction of Revolut X in the same markets earlier this year.

data.title: US-Iran Negotiations Anticipated to Reach Major Breakthrough
data.description: A senior Pakistani government official has expressed optimism about a significant development in the ongoing negotiations between the United States and Iran. According to NS3.AI, the official's expectations were reported by Saudi media outlet Al-Hadath. The discussions are aimed at addressing longstanding issues between the two nations, with hopes for a resolution that could impact regional stability.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Spot Silver Increases by 1.00% to $76.18 per Ounce
data.description: Spot silver has seen its daily gains expand to 1.00%, currently trading at $76.18 per ounce. According to Jin10, this marks a notable increase in the precious metal's value.

data.title: Central Bank of Türkiye: Gold reserves increased by 30.68 tons according to international standards.
data.description: The Central Bank of Türkiye reported that its gold reserves, measured by international standards, increased by 30.68 tons to 730.57 tons in the week ending April 17. (Jinshi)

data.title: Pakistani officials say a second round of talks between the US and Iran is expected to take place.
data.description: Pakistani officials say a second round of talks between the US and Iran is expected to take place.

data.title: Foreign media: A senior official predicts a major breakthrough in US-Iran negotiations today.
data.description: According to Saudi media outlet alhadath, a senior Pakistani government official predicts a major breakthrough in the US-Iran negotiations today.
